title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 14 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 14 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 14 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/07/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked sharply all the day.The main contract closed at 695.5,decreased of 2.59%. Traders are motivated to ship, steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and there are more transactions in the market. PBF at Shandong port dealt 730-760 yuan/mt;decrease 10-40 yuan/mt than yesterday; SSF at Shandong port dealt 648-650 yuan/mt .PBF at Tangshan port dealt 765-780 yuan/mt,decrease 8yuan/mt than yesterday.
